asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates a multi-agent startup diligence workflow, showcasing collaborative sheets, public/private agent lanes, and human-in-the-loop handoffs with clear visual evidence.

featureClarity.evidence: The video clearly highlights key features like the research sheet, concurrent agent execution, and private lanes using on-screen annotations.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the entire sequence from initial data enrichment to private analysis and final draft handoffs.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark-themed interface is clean and well-structured, though the dense layout contains a lot of simultaneous information.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of combining spreadsheets, chat, and agent execution traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state changes, trace logs, and interactive agent responses.

legibility.evidence: Most UI elements are readable, though some smaller text in the trace log and chat requires high resolution to decipher.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly applicable to financial analysts and investment teams performing structured company diligence.

productionHonesty.evidence: Explicitly demonstrates that downstream actions are approval-gated drafts rather than automated actions.

observedEvidence: Multi-agent public chat and execution lanes

defects.observed: The Room Trace log updates rapidly with dense JSON-like text, making it difficult to read in real-time.
defects.fix: Slightly slow down the transition or simplify the displayed trace output for better readability.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Run collaborative, multi-agent startup diligence in NodeRoom with public research sheets, private analyst lanes, and human-approved draft handoffs.
